nasb.text: then the priest shall come in and make an inspection. If he sees that the mark has indeed spread in the house, it is a malignant mark in the house; it is unclean.

esv.text: then the priest shall go and look. And if the disease has spread in the house, it is a persistent leprous disease in the house; it is unclean.

cnv.text: 祭司就要進去察看；如果發現病症在房屋裡有蔓延的現象，這就是房屋裡頑惡的發霉現象，那房屋就不潔淨了。

ccb.text: 祭司要去检查，若发现霉斑已蔓延，那房子就不洁净。
